name: zrndr_set_framebuffer_region
description: zRndr::SetFrameBufferRegion updates the framebuffer pointer, optional active-region rectangle and dimensions, bytes-per-pixel cache, pitch, and derived perspective-texture byte stride.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x490340 validates the framebuffer pointer write, optional active-region rectangle copy and width/height deltas, optional bits-per-pixel to bytes-per-pixel shift, pitch write, and recomputed perspective texture delta byte stride.

The native framebuffer/stride smoke verifies the rect path updates framebuffer, region dimensions, region bounds, bytes-per-pixel, pitch, and derived byte stride, then verifies the null-rect and zero-bits-per-pixel path preserves the previous region and bytes-per-pixel while updating framebuffer and pitch.
binary_safe_evidence: VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison passed for ?SetFrameBufferRegion@zRndr@@YIXPAXPAUzOpt_ViewRectSection@@HH@Z at 0x490340 with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 48 relocation bytes; 15 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
